query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roles WHERE code IN ('SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'HR_ADMIN', 'ACCOUNTANT', 'SUPERVISOR', 'GUARD')) as roles_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username IN ('superadmin', 'admin', 'hradmin', 'accountant', 'supervisor1', 'guard1')) as users_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `groups`) as groups_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers) as workers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_events) as attendance_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cost_centers WHERE code LIKE 'CC%') as cost_centers_count;
